expectations.text: A0: Output file exists with real content
expectations.evidence: verification-checklist.md is 167 lines with 8 detailed checks, each with required evidence format and acceptance criteria

expectations.text: A1: quality-scenarios is mentioned/included in the workflow
expectations.evidence: Checks 1-4 are directly driven by quality-scenarios: Check 1 (3 unit-test scenarios), Check 2 (4 integration-test scenarios), Check 3 (2 load-test scenarios), Check 4 (1 manual-review scenario)

expectations.text: A2: quality-scenarios comes AFTER architecture-style-selection and BEFORE feature-design
expectations.evidence: N/A -- Eval 3 tests verification checklist, not workflow ordering

expectations.text: A3: quality-scenarios.md is referenced as an artifact
expectations.evidence: quality-scenarios.md explicitly referenced in Checks 1-4 Confirms sections and in Summary Table rows 1-4

expectations.text: A4: Test-type categorization from quality-scenarios flows into output
expectations.evidence: Checks are organized by test type from quality-scenarios: Check 1 = unit tests (3 unit-test scenarios), Check 2 = integration tests (4 integration-test scenarios), Check 3 = load tests (2 load-test scenarios), Check 4 = manual review (1 manual-review scenario). Each check specifies the exact count and type label
